description: With a red floral design against a black background, this tie from turtle is a perfect match for a variety of dress shirts - from classic whites to blacks and maroons. Also, Also, every time you purchase a Turtle product, part of the proceeds go towards protecting and conserving turtles as part of the Save Turtle project created in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa.Length: 146 cmMade of 100% microfibre for durability and easy useHas a red floral design against a black backgroundOne loop with on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in placeWoven brand logo on the inner side of the broad tongueTie careonly dry clean
